zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth於1420年出生在英國越可爾時，她的父親William Pykworth21歲，母親Agnes Allen20歲。她於大約1435年與William de Lascelles Jackson在英國越可爾約克結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1500年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍爾布林享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth于1420年出生在英国越可爾时，她的父亲William Pykworth21岁，母亲Agnes Allen20岁。她于大约1435年与William de Lascelles Jackson在英国越可爾約克结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1500年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾霍爾布林享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pickworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places called Pickworth, in Lincolnshire and Rutland. The placenames derive from an Old English personal name Pīca + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth was born in 1420, in Yorkshire, England, her father, William Pykworth, was 21 and her mother, Agnes Allen, was 20. She married William de Lascelles Jackson about 1435, in York, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1500, in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth est née en 1420, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Pykworth, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Agnes Allen, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William de Lascelles Jackson environ 1435, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1500, à Horbling, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth 1420 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Pykworth 21 und ihre Mutter Agnes Allen 20. Sie hat um 1435 in York, Yorkshire, England William de Lascelles Jackson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1500 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Horbling, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth è nata il nel 1420 nel Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William Pykworth, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Agnes Allen, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William de Lascelles Jackson circa 1435, nel York, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1500, nel Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworthが1420年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Pykworthは21歳，母Agnes Allenは20歳であった。約1435年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークでWilliam de Lascelles Jacksonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1500年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールブリングで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth(이)가 1420년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Pykworth(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Allen(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 William de Lascelles Jackson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호르블링에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth nasceu em 1420, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Pykworth, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Allen, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Lascelles Jackson aproximadamente 1435, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1500, em Horbling, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Agnes Elizabeth Pickworth родилась в 1420 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Pykworth было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Allen, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Lascelles Jackson около 1435 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1500 г. в местности хаурблинг, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.
